title: EpicFight：TouhouLittleMaid
description: An Epic Fight addon that gives Touhou Little Maid custom combat modes and attack animations from the Epic Fight mod.
body:
An EpicFight addon that gives [TouhouLittleMaid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) AttackAnimations from the [EpicFight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) mod.
# Content Introduction
Added a new task: Fight Mode
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44bf58495077e64a4f1be199c7721d66edc46465.png)

When the maid wields a weapon, the attack logic changes according to the type of weapon.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f231a9102ecd6bfd5ce30154ca9c8c5d49a7f8da.png)

Since the EpicFight utilizes its own MeshModel model Renderer, this module has only made simple adaptations to the WineFox Model

# Required Dependencies:
You must use these exact versions, otherwise the mod may not work properly:

[EpicFight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight): 20.14 or later

[TouhouLittleMaid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) : 1.5.0 or later

[EpicFight-Avalon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/epic-fight-avalon): 20.12.6.4
